positive: Central, highly intricate, symmetrical composition featuring stylized celestial flora. Majestic elements include glowing crescent moons, bioluminescent stylized jungle ferns, and swirling cosmic nebula clouds, all interconnected by delicate filigree vines. The color palette is deep midnight indigo, vivid teal, and brilliant accents of shimmering gold and emerald green. Neo-Art Nouveau style, hyper-detailed linework, strong silhouettes for clean printing, volumetric lighting, high contrast, perfect for commercial apparel merchandise, vector quality illustration.
